message.content:
Fix dark theme issues in two React/TypeScript modules at /var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/src/components/modules/Documents.tsx and /var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/src/components/modules/Drawings.tsx.

The app uses a dark theme. Both files have light-theme Tailwind classes that break the dark theme.

Apply these replacements throughout BOTH files:
- `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`
- `bg-gray-50` → `bg-gray-900`
- `bg-gray-100` → `bg-gray-800`
- `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`
- `border-gray-300` → `border-gray-700`
- `text-gray-900` → `text-white`
- `text-gray-800` → `text-gray-100`
- `text-gray-700` → `text-gray-300`
- `focus:ring-blue-500` → `focus:ring-orange-500`
- `focus:border-blue-500` → `focus:border-orange-500`

Also fix any input/select/textarea elements that use light-themed styling — they should use `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white placeholder-gray-500`.

Read each file fully before editing. Make surgical edits using the Edit tool. Do not change any logic, only CSS classes. After editing both files, verify no `bg-white`, `bg-gray-50`, `bg-gray-100`, `border-gray-200`, `border-gray-300`, `text-gray-900`, `text-gray-800`, `text-gray-700` remain.

content.text: I'll read both files first, then apply the dark theme fixes systematically.

Both files are read. `Drawings.tsx` is already mostly dark-themed — I'll note any remaining issues there. `Documents.tsx` has extensive light-theme classes throughout. Let me now apply all the fixes.

Starting with `Documents.tsx`:

content.text:
Those three lines use `bg-white/10` and `bg-white/20` — these are semi-transparent white overlays used as hover buttons on the dark drawing card thumbnail, which is intentional dark-theme design (they look fine on dark). `bg-white/10` is not `bg-white` — it's an alpha variant that works on dark backgrounds as a subtle glassmorphism effect. These are not light-theme breakages, so `Drawings.tsx` needs no changes.

Let me do a final combined verification on both files to confirm all targeted classes are gone:

content.content: No matches found
No matches found

content.text:
Both files are clean. Here is a summary of everything changed:

**Documents.tsx** — all light-theme classes replaced:

- Page heading `text-gray-900` → `text-white`
- KPI cards: `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900`, `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`, KPI value `text-gray-900` → `text-white`, icon backgrounds `bg-blue-50/green-50/yellow-50/gray-50` → dark equivalents (`bg-*-900/30`, `bg-gray-800`), icon colours updated to `*-400` variants for dark contrast
- `statusColour` map: all light badges (`bg-gray-100`, `bg-yellow-100`, etc.) → dark equivalents (`bg-gray-800`, `bg-yellow-900/50`, etc.)
- Tab bar: `border-gray-200` → `border-gray-700`, hover `text-gray-700` → `text-gray-300`, tab badge fallback `bg-gray-100 text-gray-600` → `bg-gray-800 text-gray-400`, "Under Review" / "Approved" tab badges → dark amber/green variants
- Filter bar: `bg-white border-gray-200` → `bg-gray-900 border-gray-700`; all inputs/selects → `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white placeholder-gray-500`
- Table: `bg-white border-gray-200` → `bg-gray-900 border-gray-700`; `thead` `bg-gray-50 border-gray-200` → `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700`; `tbody` dividers `divide-gray-100` → `divide-gray-800`; row hover `bg-gray-50` → `bg-gray-800/50`; cell text colours updated to `text-white`, `text-gray-400`, `text-gray-300`
- Modal: `bg-white` → `bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700`; header border/bg → dark; close button hover `bg-gray-100` → `bg-gray-800`; all form labels `text-gray-700` → `text-gray-300`; all inputs/selects/textarea → `bg-gray-800 border-gray-700 text-white placeholder-gray-500`; Cancel button → dark style

**Drawings.tsx** — already fully dark-themed; no changes needed. The `bg-white/10` and `bg-white/20` classes on overlay buttons in the drawing card thumbnails are intentional semi-transparent glassmorphism effects, not light-theme breakages.
